values.title: Vanguard Staffing Solutions Homepage
values.hero_title: The Right Talent, The Right Fit
values.hero_description: We connect exceptional professionals with leading companies. Whether you are looking to hire top talent or advance your career, Vanguard delivers results through personalized recruiting and deep industry expertise.
values.cta_title: Ready to Find Your Next Great Hire?
values.cta_description: Tell us about your staffing needs and our recruiters will deliver qualified candidates within 48 hours. No upfront fees - you only pay when we make a successful placement.

values.title: Senior Software Engineer
values.body:
A fast-growing fintech company is seeking an experienced software engineer to join their platform team. You will architect and build scalable microservices that power their payments infrastructure.

Responsibilities

  • Design and implement backend services using Go and Python
  • Lead technical design reviews and mentor junior engineers
  • Collaborate with product managers on feature planning
  • Ensure system reliability with comprehensive testing and monitoring

Requirements

  • 5+ years of backend development experience
  • Strong experience with distributed systems and microservices
  • Proficiency in Go, Python, or Java
  • Experience with AWS or GCP cloud platforms
  • BS/MS in Computer Science or equivalent

Benefits

Competitive salary, equity package, unlimited PTO, remote-friendly, health/dental/vision, 401(k) match, professional development budget.

values.title: Marketing Director
values.body:
A healthcare services company is looking for a Marketing Director to lead brand strategy, digital marketing, and patient acquisition across their network of clinics.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute integrated marketing strategies
  • Manage a team of 8 marketing professionals
  • Oversee digital advertising, SEO, and content marketing
  • Drive patient acquisition and retention campaigns
  • Report on marketing ROI to executive leadership

Requirements

  • 8+ years of marketing experience, 3+ in a leadership role
  • Healthcare or medical services marketing experience preferred
  • Strong analytical skills with proficiency in marketing analytics tools
  • Proven track record of driving measurable growth

values.title: Financial Controller
values.body:
A manufacturing company with $200M in annual revenue seeks a Financial Controller to oversee all accounting operations and financial reporting.

Responsibilities

  • Manage the accounting team and all financial operations
  • Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements
  • Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis
  • Ensure compliance with GAAP and regulatory requirements
  • Drive process improvements and system implementations

Requirements

  • CPA required, MBA preferred
  • 10+ years of progressive accounting experience
  • Manufacturing industry experience strongly preferred
  • Experience with ERP systems (SAP or Oracle)

values.title: Construction Project Manager
values.body:
A commercial construction firm is hiring a Project Manager to oversee large-scale commercial and institutional building projects valued at $10M-$50M.

Responsibilities

  • Manage all phases of construction from pre-construction through closeout
  • Coordinate with architects, engineers, and subcontractors
  • Monitor project budgets, schedules, and quality standards
  • Ensure compliance with building codes and safety regulations

Requirements

  • 7+ years of commercial construction management experience
  • PMP certification preferred
  • Proficiency in Procore, Bluebeam, and MS Project
  • Strong negotiation and stakeholder management skills

values.title: Technology
values.body:
Our technology recruiting team places software engineers, data scientists, product managers, and IT leaders at companies ranging from startups to Fortune 500 enterprises.

Roles We Fill

  • Software Engineering (Frontend, Backend, Full-Stack)
  • Data Science & Machine Learning
  • Product Management
  • DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure
  • Cybersecurity
  • CTO & VP Engineering leadership

Our Approach

We maintain a curated network of pre-vetted tech professionals and use technical assessments to ensure candidates meet the skill requirements before presentation to clients.

values.title: Healthcare
values.body:
We partner with hospitals, clinics, and healthcare companies to place clinical, administrative, and executive talent. Our healthcare recruiters understand the regulatory landscape and credentialing requirements unique to this industry.

Roles We Fill

  • Registered Nurses and Nurse Practitioners
  • Medical Directors and Department Heads
  • Healthcare Administrators
  • Medical Billing and Coding Specialists
  • Pharmaceutical Sales Representatives

Compliance

All healthcare placements include thorough background checks, license verification, and credentialing support.

values.title: Finance & Accounting
values.body:
From CFOs to staff accountants, our finance and accounting practice places professionals at all levels. We specialize in both permanent placements and interim assignments for companies in transition.

Roles We Fill

  • Chief Financial Officers
  • Controllers and Assistant Controllers
  • Financial Analysts and FP&A Managers
  • Audit and Compliance Professionals
  • AP/AR Specialists and Staff Accountants

Interim Solutions

Need immediate finance support? Our interim executives can step in within days to cover leaves, transitions, or special projects.

values.title: Karen Mitchell
values.body: Karen founded Vanguard Staffing Solutions with the belief that great recruiting starts with relationships. With 20 years of staffing industry experience, she has built a firm known for quality placements and exceptional client service.

values.title: Ryan O'Connor
values.body: Ryan leads our technology recruiting division. A former software developer himself, he brings technical credibility to every search and understands the nuances of evaluating engineering talent. He has placed over 500 technology professionals in his career.

values.title: Diana Flores
values.body: Diana manages our healthcare staffing practice, specializing in clinical and administrative placements. Her deep network in the healthcare community and understanding of credentialing requirements make her an invaluable partner for healthcare organizations.

values.title: Top Hiring Trends to Watch in 2026
values.body:
The employment landscape continues to evolve rapidly. Here are the key trends shaping hiring and workforce strategy in 2026.

Key Trends

  • AI-augmented recruiting - Companies are using AI to screen resumes and predict candidate success, but human judgment remains critical for cultural fit
  • Skills-based hiring - More employers are dropping degree requirements in favor of demonstrated skills and certifications
  • Return-to-office negotiations - Hybrid work policies are becoming a key differentiator in talent attraction
  • Pay transparency - Salary range disclosure is now mandated in many states, changing compensation conversations

values.title: Resume Tips That Actually Get You Interviews
values.body:
As recruiters who review thousands of resumes each month, here is what we know works - and what does not.

What Gets Attention

  • Quantified achievements ("Increased revenue by 35%" vs. "Managed sales")
  • Clean, scannable formatting with clear section headers
  • A strong summary statement tailored to the target role
  • Relevant keywords that match the job description

Common Mistakes

  • Generic objective statements
  • Listing responsibilities instead of accomplishments
  • Including every job you have ever had
  • Typos and formatting inconsistencies

Need help refining your resume? Our career advisors offer free resume reviews for all registered candidates.

image.alt: Person working on resume at desk
image.title: Resume Tips

values.title: 5 Employee Retention Strategies That Work
values.body:
With the cost of replacing an employee averaging 1.5-2x their salary, retention is a strategic priority. Here are proven strategies from our client partners.

Effective Strategies

  • Competitive compensation reviews - Conduct market analysis every 6 months, not annually
  • Career development paths - Employees stay when they see a clear future
  • Manager training - People leave managers, not companies
  • Flexible work arrangements - Trust employees with how and where they work
  • Recognition programs - Regular, genuine recognition costs nothing but yields loyalty

values.title: About Vanguard Staffing Solutions
values.body:
Vanguard Staffing Solutions has been connecting great companies with exceptional talent since 2008. We specialize in professional staffing across technology, healthcare, finance, manufacturing, and construction industries.

Our Difference

Unlike high-volume staffing firms, we take a consultative approach. Every search begins with a deep understanding of your business, culture, and the specific skills needed for success in the role.

Our Values

  • Quality Over Quantity - We present only candidates we would hire ourselves
  • Transparency - Honest communication about timelines, market conditions, and candidate fit
  • Partnership - We invest in long-term client relationships, not one-off transactions
  • Candidate Care - We treat every candidate with respect and provide coaching throughout the process
